verses.1: Praise the LORD! Praise God in His sanctuary; Praise Him in His mighty expanse.
verses.2: Praise Him for His mighty deeds; Praise Him according to His excellent greatness.
verses.3: Praise Him with trumpet sound; Praise Him with harp and lyre.
verses.4: Praise Him with tambourine and dancing; Praise Him with stringed instruments and flute.
verses.5: Praise Him with loud cymbals; Praise Him with resounding cymbals.
verses.6: Everything that has breath shall praise the LORD. Praise the LORD!
